sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49153" key="qriggi/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θριγγίον</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρῐαμβ-γός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρῐαμβ-γόω</orth>, later forms for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θριγκίον</foreign>, etc.</entryFree>
